name: TC-14: Dashboard Restock Alerts Visibility
description: Dashboard correctly displays low stock products requiring restock under the alert section.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Scroll down to the Restock Alert table section
Verify the restock alert table lists products where current stock is lower than minimum stock
